title: 校园阅读与方向周
summary: 本周会认识新字 东、西、都、读、对，再复习 杯、爱、本。我们会在校园导览、图书角和借书交流中学习方向表达、礼貌回应和阅读话题。

char_cards.meaning: east; host (i.e. sitting on east side of guest); landlord; surname Dong
char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ dōng xī ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ dōng xī ”。

char_cards.meaning: all, both; entirely (due to) each; even; already
to read; to study; reading of word (i.e. pronunciation), similar to 拼音[pin1 yin1]

char_cards.sentence_pinyin: wǒ men xué xí “ duì bù qǐ ”。
wǒ men xué xí “ bēi zǐ ”。

char_cards.meaning: to love; affection; to be fond of; to like
roots or stems of plants; origin; source; this; the current; root; foundation; basis; classifier for books, periodicals, files etc; originally

sentences.pinyin_text: qǐng xiān wǎng dōng zǒu， zài xiàng xī kàn。
wǒ men dōu ài dú shū。
duì bù qǐ， wǒ ná cuò běn zǐ le。
dú shū shì wǒ de ài hǎo。

story.title: 校园导览
story.text: 老师带大家看校园地图，先找东边，再看西边的图书角。
story.pinyin_text: lǎo shī dài dà jiā kàn jiào yuán de tú， xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān de tú shū jiǎo。
story.dialogue_pinyin: xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。
story.image_prompt:
Create a storybook-style learning illustration for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters.
Scene goal: 老师带大家看校园地图，先找东边，再看西边的图书角。
Scene type: 课堂互动
Location: 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境
Focus characters: 东、西、对
Focus words: 东边、西边
Visual direction:
- Use soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters, and an age-appropriate atmosphere for learners around ages 9-13.
- Build a grounded educational scene connected to real Chinese learning moments such as classroom discussion, home routines, reading, greeting, helping, planning, travel, or going out.
- Include meaningful props related to Chinese learning, such as books, chalkboard, toys, flowers, bags, tables, cups, or other scene-appropriate objects.
- Keep the layout clean and stable, suitable for a modern learning page or printable study material.
Composition:
- One clear main action, readable background, strong focal point, and enough empty space for later educational text layout.
- Make the illustration feel polished, warm, and visually consistent with the Fun Hanzi style, without looking like preschool material.
IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT generate any Chinese characters, pinyin, letters, or text in the image.
- Leave empty space where educational text can be added later.
- Hanzi and pinyin planning notes belong in the separate text layout, not inside the image.
- If any visible text is produced by mistake, it must be treated as an error and regenerated.
story.video_prompt:
Create an educational micro-story video for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: 10-15 second school-age micro-story clip, gentle camera move, warm realistic lighting, clear staging, simple shot rhythm, vivid everyday setting.
Scene title: 校园导览
Learning goal: 老师带大家看校园地图，先找东边，再看西边的图书角。
Real-life setting: 课堂互动 / 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境
Character relationship: 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
Focus characters: 东、西、对
Focus words: 东边、西边
Fixed spoken line: 先找东边，再看西边。
Reference pinyin for production only: xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。
Story direction: Build a school-age learning micro-story instead of a dry teaching clip. Use a believable 课堂互动 in 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境. Show 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答. Let 东边、西边 and the focus characters 东、西、对 appear through a tiny real-life event. The story must contain a setup, a small task or question, a response, and a warm ending. Keep the tone suitable for learners around ages 9-13, a little more mature and grounded than preschool material. Make the spoken line feel natural and land clearly on “先找东边，再看西边。”.
Story structure:
- Opening: establish a real place and a clear student activity.
- Middle beat: introduce one small task, question, or discovery connected to the target words.
- Speaking beat: let the character say the fixed line naturally in context.
- Ending: give a warm response or tiny success moment.
Visual direction:
- Keep the action grounded in family life, classroom life, going out, greeting, helping, reading, planning, traveling, or welcoming someone.
- Use clear staging, readable props, gentle motion, and one main action per shot.
- Keep the same characters, costume, and mood consistent with the matching image.
Text and subtitle rules:
- Reference these exact pinyin spellings for production planning and script checking only: 东 -> dōng; 西 -> xī; 对 -> duì. Keep these exact Hanzi+pinyin pairs in your notes: 东 dōng | 西 xī | 对 duì.
- Use the fixed spoken line provided in the script. Reference pinyin for production only: xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。. Do not generate pinyin subtitles inside the video; the learning page will show the exact teaching pinyin separately.
- If text appears on screen, prefer Hanzi only and avoid auto-generated pinyin subtitles.
- Hanzi writing and pinyin spelling must be absolutely correct; do not invent, simplify, misspell, or place tone marks on the wrong vowel.
Quality bar:
- Avoid flashcard-style pointing at words.
- Avoid empty backgrounds or generic stock actions.
- Make the moment feel believable, warm, story-led, and useful for a child learner.
story.video_script:
场景：校园导览
视频类型：课堂互动
真实场合：小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境
人物关系：老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
固定台词：先找东边，再看西边。
参考拼音：xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。
目标字：东、西、对
剧情结构：先交代一个真实小场景，再出现一个小问题或小任务，接着通过人物互动自然说出台词，最后温暖收尾。
镜头1：建立真实场景，让学生一眼看懂人物在做什么，并为“先找东边，再看西边。”做铺垫。
镜头2：出现一个具体动作或小问题，把目标字 东、西、对 藏在物件、地点、任务或人物反应里，不要像生硬教学演示。
镜头3：角色在情境里自然说出固定台词“先找东边，再看西边。”，嘴型清楚，情绪真实，动作和台词有关联。
镜头4：给出回应或结果，例如同学反馈、老师确认、家人回应、任务完成，让学习者感觉这个句子在真实生活里有用。
镜头5：收尾停留 1-2 秒，保持画面温暖、真实、易懂，但不要过于幼态。
字幕策略：视频里不强制加入拼音字幕，拼音会由学习页面单独展示；如需字幕，只保留汉字即可。
story.image_text_layout:
【标题】
先找东边，再看西边。
xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。

【重点字】
东
dōng
西
xī
对
duì

【词语】
东边
西边

【教学标签】
东 dōng | 西 xī | 对 duì

story.title: 图书角
story.text: 午休时，几个同学坐在图书角交流最近读过的书。
story.pinyin_text: wǔ xiū shí， jǐ gè tóng xué zuò zài tú shū jiǎo jiāo liú zuì jìn dú guò de shū。
story.dialogue_pinyin: wǒ men dōu ài dú shū。

story.title: 借书交流
story.text: 自习结束后，一位同学把水杯放在桌上，收拾时拿错了别人的本子。
story.pinyin_text: zì xí jiē shù hòu， yī wèi tóng xué bǎ shuǐ bēi fàng zài zhuō shàng， shōu shí shí ná cuò le bié rén de běn zǐ。
story.dialogue_pinyin: duì bù qǐ， wǒ ná cuò běn zǐ le。

Location: 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境
Focus characters: 对、本、杯
Focus words: 对不起、本子
Visual direction:
- Use soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters, and an age-appropriate atmosphere for learners around ages 9-13.
- Build a grounded educational scene connected to real Chinese learning moments such as classroom discussion, home routines, reading, greeting, helping, planning, travel, or going out.
- Include meaningful props related to Chinese learning, such as books, chalkboard, toys, flowers, bags, tables, cups, or other scene-appropriate objects.
- Keep the layout clean and stable, suitable for a modern learning page or printable study material.
Composition:
- One clear main action, readable background, strong focal point, and enough empty space for later educational text layout.
- Make the illustration feel polished, warm, and visually consistent with the Fun Hanzi style, without looking like preschool material.
IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT generate any Chinese characters, pinyin, letters, or text in the image.
- Leave empty space where educational text can be added later.
- Hanzi and pinyin planning notes belong in the separate text layout, not inside the image.
- If any visible text is produced by mistake, it must be treated as an error and regenerated.

video_tasks.prompt:
Create an educational micro-story video for school-age Chinese learners.
Style baseline: 10-15 second school-age micro-story clip, gentle camera move, warm realistic lighting, clear staging, simple shot rhythm, vivid everyday setting.
Scene title: 校园导览
Learning goal: 老师带大家看校园地图，先找东边，再看西边的图书角。
Real-life setting: 课堂互动 / 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境
Character relationship: 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
Focus characters: 东、西、对
Focus words: 东边、西边
Fixed spoken line: 先找东边，再看西边。
Reference pinyin for production only: xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。
Story direction: Build a school-age learning micro-story instead of a dry teaching clip. Use a believable 课堂互动 in 小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境. Show 老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答. Let 东边、西边 and the focus characters 东、西、对 appear through a tiny real-life event. The story must contain a setup, a small task or question, a response, and a warm ending. Keep the tone suitable for learners around ages 9-13, a little more mature and grounded than preschool material. Make the spoken line feel natural and land clearly on “先找东边，再看西边。”.
Story structure:
- Opening: establish a real place and a clear student activity.
- Middle beat: introduce one small task, question, or discovery connected to the target words.
- Speaking beat: let the character say the fixed line naturally in context.
- Ending: give a warm response or tiny success moment.
Visual direction:
- Keep the action grounded in family life, classroom life, going out, greeting, helping, reading, planning, traveling, or welcoming someone.
- Use clear staging, readable props, gentle motion, and one main action per shot.
- Keep the same characters, costume, and mood consistent with the matching image.
Text and subtitle rules:
- Reference these exact pinyin spellings for production planning and script checking only: 东 -> dōng; 西 -> xī; 对 -> duì. Keep these exact Hanzi+pinyin pairs in your notes: 东 dōng | 西 xī | 对 duì.
- Use the fixed spoken line provided in the script. Reference pinyin for production only: xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。. Do not generate pinyin subtitles inside the video; the learning page will show the exact teaching pinyin separately.
- If text appears on screen, prefer Hanzi only and avoid auto-generated pinyin subtitles.
- Hanzi writing and pinyin spelling must be absolutely correct; do not invent, simplify, misspell, or place tone marks on the wrong vowel.
Quality bar:
- Avoid flashcard-style pointing at words.
- Avoid empty backgrounds or generic stock actions.
- Make the moment feel believable, warm, story-led, and useful for a child learner.

video_storyboard.script:
场景：校园导览
视频类型：课堂互动
真实场合：小学高年级或初中预备阶段的中文课堂或校园环境
人物关系：老师和学生围绕一个具体任务进行交流、观察或回答
固定台词：先找东边，再看西边。
参考拼音：xiān zhǎo dōng biān， zài kàn xī biān。
目标字：东、西、对
剧情结构：先交代一个真实小场景，再出现一个小问题或小任务，接着通过人物互动自然说出台词，最后温暖收尾。
镜头1：建立真实场景，让学生一眼看懂人物在做什么，并为“先找东边，再看西边。”做铺垫。
镜头2：出现一个具体动作或小问题，把目标字 东、西、对 藏在物件、地点、任务或人物反应里，不要像生硬教学演示。
镜头3：角色在情境里自然说出固定台词“先找东边，再看西边。”，嘴型清楚，情绪真实，动作和台词有关联。
镜头4：给出回应或结果，例如同学反馈、老师确认、家人回应、任务完成，让学习者感觉这个句子在真实生活里有用。
镜头5：收尾停留 1-2 秒，保持画面温暖、真实、易懂，但不要过于幼态。
字幕策略：视频里不强制加入拼音字幕，拼音会由学习页面单独展示；如需字幕，只保留汉字即可。
